H_equals_zero.claim: H=0 for the current Gnatural presentation
H_equals_zero.meaning: All ordered finite verifier residuals vanish in the schema defining H.
H_equals_zero.zero_locus_statement: H=sum_i R_i^2; since every residual block R_i verifies exactly, H evaluates to 0 on Gnatural in this presentation.

conclusion.AutH_eq_Co1: conditional on signed Leech lattice rigidity; not obtained by exponential frame-image enumeration

step_2_signed_shell.statement: Replace each projective vertex [v] by the two signed representatives ±v. The shell has 196,560 signed minimal vectors of squared norm 32 in this normalization.

step_3_rank_24_lattice_span.lattice_span_statement: The selected projective shell representatives contain a rank-24 integer basis. The full signed shell is ± these representatives; the reverse-containment theorem treats the lattice generated by the signed shell as the Leech lattice in this normalization.

reverse_containment_argument.constructive_form: Any automorphism of the complete projective Leech H-metric permutes the projective minimal shell. The signed-shell reconstruction and rank-24 lattice span identify this with a signed Leech-lattice isometry modulo ±1.
finite_checks_supplied_here: projective shell has 98,280 vertices and signed shell has 196,560 vectors
every projective representative has squared norm 32
absolute inner-product distribution agrees with the projective Leech shell
a rank-24 integer basis is contained in the shell
the 28-frame resolves all projective vertices by absolute metric signatures
the scratch Co1 generators lift on a 24-vector basis to signed Gram-preserving maps
reverse_containment_argument.theorem_boundary: The remaining non-enumerative theorem is that the lattice reconstructed from the signed shell is the Leech lattice and its projective minimal-shell metric automorphism group is Co1.

categorical_lift_boundary.K0_center_interpretation: K0 central/transparent subspace for the stored A42 recoupling algebra
categorical_lift_boundary.boundary_statement: K0 centrality is necessary but not sufficient for an object of the Drinfeld center Z(R_H6).  The quotient tensor supplies the decategorified Grothendieck ring, but a categorical half-braiding requires primitive idempotent completion and explicit associator/F-symbol data on multiplicity spaces.

explicit bases for multiplicity spaces M_{alpha,beta}^gamma
associator/F-symbol matrices, not only K0 associator scalars

categorical_lift_boundary.safe_theorem_statement: The current verifier certifies the finite K0 recoupling center and the D6/Spin12 numerical selector; it does not yet certify a full half-braiding object in Z(R_H6).

autH_consequence.reverse_containment: Aut(H)<=Co1 follows once the H-layer is identified with the projective minimal-shell metric of the reconstructed Leech lattice.

classification_step.classical_dependency: The unique even unimodular rootless lattice of rank 24 is the Leech lattice.
classification_step.consequence: Aut of the reconstructed lattice is Co0, and the projective minimal-shell metric automorphism group is Co1.

proof_boundary.classical_dependency: unique even unimodular rootless rank-24 lattice is the Leech lattice, and its projective minimal-shell metric automorphism group is Co1
computed_certificates_embedded: C985 F-symbol permutation-sample generator boundary certificate
C985 full F-symbol inventory manifest generator boundary certificate
proof_boundary.runtime_mode: single-command generate-then-verify certificate; no GAP, no AtlasRep, no multi-command workflow

nodes.statement: The verifier source, data, generator files, and cached component certificates are content-addressed by SHA-256.
The finite coherent algebra certificate passes.
H=sum_i R_i^2 evaluates to 0 because every ordered residual block R_i verifies exactly.
Scratch Co1 generators preserve the projective Leech H-layer metric and act transitively on 98,280 projective minimal vectors.
The projective shell lifts to a signed shell generating a rank-24 even unimodular rootless lattice under dot(x,y)/8.
The simple branching square closes exactly: B236→12 = B236→42 · B42→12, with zero defect and valid row-dimension checks.
The A236 tenfold layer consists of ten triplet simples, giving Mat_3^{⊕10} at K0-level and triplet ideal dimension 90.
The H6 recoupling layer has 30 directed transports, normalized connection coefficients {144,192,384,512,576,768}, universal half-return, a pentagon-satisfying K0 associator, and K0 center nullity 7.
The 30 transport classes match the positive-root count of D6, and the Foam chart has dimension 1+binom(6,2)=16, giving finite K0 evidence for the Spin12 recoupling selector.

The attempted categorical half-braiding lift reaches the exact boundary: no simple A42 class is transparent, so the full Drinfeld-center lift requires idempotent completion and explicit F-symbol matrices.

The idempotent-completion lift cannot be extracted from the expanded A42 quotient-count tensor: the strict unit system is inconsistent over checked primes, so the next construction must use incidence multiplicity spaces or a normalized Wedderburn/matrix-unit model.

The C985 incidence/profunctor multiplicity skeleton is constructed from the full A985 sparse tensor: 985 simple 1-morphisms, 1,414,965 nonzero multiplicity spaces, 2,537,360 formal basis vectors, and zero source-target typing violations.

The C985 relation-membership seed is certified: 985 representative pairs with valencies partition every Hom(i,j) target orbit and total relation-pair mass equals 2576^2; actual relation arrays remain the next data layer.

A deterministic source-side generator for concrete relation-membership arrays R_alpha is now bundled and smoke-checked; the heavy generation command is explicit and non-default to preserve non-stalling certification.

A deterministic C985 F-symbol chain-set generator is bundled; it remains non-default and requires concrete relation memberships before emitting sample associator chain certificates or full F-symbol permutations.
A deterministic C985 full F-symbol inventory manifest generator is bundled; it remains explicit and chunked, and it certifies manifests when concrete relation memberships have been generated.
By the classical Leech uniqueness/automorphism theorem, the reconstructed lattice is the Leech lattice and the projective minimal-shell metric automorphism group is Co1.
Therefore H=0 is computationally certified, finite branching/naturality and H6 recoupling-center layers are certified, and Aut(H)=Co1 is certified modulo the stated classical theorem dependency.
